内容:
It's cheaper to buy this mount on Amazon than on the official website, but you get what you pay for - mine shipped with FLESHLIGHT right on the label. The jokes made by my apartment manager when I picked up the package had the same level of subtlety as this label. Not fun.

In terms of the product itself, I believe it really enhances the experience. Nice to keep your hands free while doing the deed in a place that, well, exists to clean you up. My last one lasted about 3 months of pretty consistent use, which to me is decent but not ideal. Suction was perfect for the first 2 months then got progressively worse. Hoping this replacement has a longer lifespan.
内容评价-翻译:
在亚马逊上买这个支架比在官网便宜，但一分钱一分货——我的包裹标签上赫然印着“FLESHLIGHT”。我去取包裹时，公寓经理开的玩笑和这个标签一样直白。一点也不好笑。

就产品本身而言，我认为它确实提升了体验。在一个本就是用来清洁你的地方办事时，能解放双手挺好的。我的上一个用了大约3个月，使用频率还挺高，对我来说算不错但不够理想。前两个月的吸力非常好，之后就逐渐变差了。希望这个替换品能用得更久。

标题: A few issues, but overall does what it should.
内容:
This is a decent little attachment, but it does have some issues.

The suction cup part is quite strong, but does appear to have a few issues with water, despite being a 'shower' mount.

The wing nut has to be tightened down considerably before it is tight enough. In itself not a problem except that it will appear stable until you start thrusting, and then the angle will change.

There is a lot of loss of the toy's suction, this seems to be mostly averted by blocking the small slot visible in the picture above.
内容评价-翻译:
这是一个不错的小配件，但确实存在一些问题。

吸盘部分相当牢固，但尽管是“淋浴”支架，在遇水时似乎还是有一些问题。

蝶形螺母必须拧得很紧才能足够牢固。这本身不是问题，只是在你开始使用之前它看起来很稳定，一旦开始使用，角度就会发生变化。

玩具的吸力损失很大，通过堵住上图中可见的小槽，这一问题似乎基本可以避免。

标题: Was expecting something a bit more flexible
内容:
I wish it was a more flexible silicone with a fleshy feel. Also it is just a vibrator and doesn’t move in a back and forth action.
The app isn’t necessary to use the device but does add a bit of fun, especially if you have someone who wants to take control of your fun. My only complaints are that it needs an alarm function so I can wake up with it, the sound function doesn’t turn it off with silence and the custom mode needs more preset options like pulse that you could tune up and change speed.
It’s very powerful so that’s a big plus.
内容评价-翻译:
我希望它是一种更柔软、有肉感的硅胶。而且它只是一个振动器，没有前后移动的动作。
这个应用程序不是使用该设备的必要条件，但确实增加了一点乐趣，特别是如果你有一个想控制你乐趣的人的话。我唯一的抱怨是它需要一个闹钟功能，这样我就可以用它醒来，声音功能不会在静音时关闭，自定义模式需要更多预设选项，比如可以调整速度的脉冲。
它的功率非常大，这是一个很大的优点。

标题: Too many issues with too little gain
内容:
Look, we all get it. You or a loved one has the right lower portion and the context has come that it wants a little “special treatment.” You can do it better elsewhere.

This thing is, first and foremost, just too loud. Don’t get me wrong, anything with a motor in there will generate some noise, especially at a budget price. But this is far too much for anyone not aroused by mechanical groaning. Even if you turn up audio on your “special treatment aide media,” you can’t truly escape it.

The heat setting is probably a main draw to this one over other similar devices in this range, and it is very nice… except it takes approximately 15 business days to actually heat up, not even accounting for the times the heat appeared to turn off completely on its own, no button press necessary.

And the battery on this makes that last part even worse. The battery is not very good, lasting typically less than needed if it wasn’t charged within the hour. Fully charged and left unused for a couple of days? You’re getting minutes, maybe. As long as it takes to charge, too, you have to schedule the whole shindig well in advance if you have a busy calendar.

The other settings for vibration and stroke are… fine. They do sufficient things even just preprogrammed on the device. There are better budget options with better settings, but these don’t not do enough.

The sleeve, similarly, isn’t bad, but isn’t great. I’m concerned even early on with resiliency, as it appears to already have some possible breakdown towards the furthest back, of all places, which is certainly not ideal as it seems like a great way to get lubrications at the least in the device in a way it probably shouldn’t.

The phone holder does hold a phone, though. I’ll give it that.
内容评价-翻译:
听着，我们都明白。你或你爱的人有权利享受一些“特殊待遇”，而且现在时机也到了。你完全可以在其他地方买到更好的。

问题是，首先，这东西太吵了。别误会，任何带马达的东西都会产生一些噪音，尤其是在预算有限的情况下。但对于那些不喜欢机械轰鸣声的人来说，这声音实在太大了。就算你把“特殊待遇辅助媒体”的音量调大，也根本无法完全掩盖它的噪音。

加热功能可能是它相比同价位其他类似产品的主要卖点，这一点确实不错……但它加热起来大概需要15个工作日那么久，还不算那些它自己无缘无故就完全关闭加热功能的时候，根本不需要按任何按钮。

而且它的电池让情况雪上加霜。电池非常不耐用，除非在一小时内充过电，否则续航时间通常不够用。充满电后闲置几天？那你可能只能用几分钟。充电时间也很长，所以如果你日程繁忙，就得提前很久安排好整个“活动”。

震动和抽动的其他设置……还行。即使是设备上预先编程好的模式，也能起到一定作用。有更好的预算选择，它们的设置更好，但这些设置也不是完全不行。

套筒也差不多，不算差，但也不算好。我很早就担心它的耐用性，因为它看起来在最靠后的位置已经有了一些可能的损坏，这当然不理想，因为这似乎很容易让润滑剂（至少是润滑剂）以一种不该有的方式进入设备内部。

不过，手机支架确实能架住手机。这点我得承认。

标题: Too Tight, Not The Good Kind Either...
内容: Worked as advertised however, if you're like my partner who's well endowed and likes it rough it's certainly not the "greatest" option as some like to claim. We unfortunately decided on a refund based on two factors, the first one being it's just not that enjoyable and the second being that the app integration SUCKS. He kept telling me to slow down when I didn't even have my finger on the slider, we also experienced several issues with the toy just cutting out at random intervals but whether that was from too hard of a stroke or the mechanics itself is beyond me. If you're looking for a high quality piece of equipment TRUST ME, there are better out there...

标题: Works well as stand alone pump
内容:
Pump has good suction and multiple settings for a variery of effects. Built in vibrating bullet is strong and has multiple settings too. Heating aspect is ok but only really effects just a part of the unit and you'd have to hit it to actually feel it. The inner sleeve is soft and holds suction well. It is easy to take out and clean but a task to put back in.

The app is ok for maybe remote play but is useless if using on your own. App has basic features and video that aren't even worth having. They look like videos for 900 numbers from back in the day. I wouldn't bother downloading app.

There is one absolute negative about this unit and that is the power plug. Its a specific 3.5 mm jack plug (like headphones) and sticks out like a sore thumb. It is probe to breaking due to sticking out on top and will be the first thing to break. Which is what happened. The plug is not reinforced or protected. It would have been better if they used a regular USB port of some type that is more common.

Overall more hassle to clean and put back together than to use in the first place. I had to request a refund due to power cord breaking in less than a month.
内容评价-翻译:
该泵吸力良好，有多种设置可产生不同效果。内置的振动子弹强度大，也有多种设置。加热功能还行，但实际上只对设备的一部分有作用，而且必须直接接触才能感觉到。内套筒柔软，密封性好。它很容易取出和清洁，但装回去却很麻烦。

应用程序或许可以用于远程控制，但如果是自己使用就毫无用处。应用程序的基本功能和视频甚至都不值得拥有。它们看起来就像过去900号码的视频。我不会费心下载这个应用程序。

这个设备有一个绝对的缺点，那就是电源插头。它是一个特定的3.5毫米杰克插头（就像耳机插头），显眼得让人不舒服。由于它突出在顶部，很容易损坏，而且会是第一个坏掉的部件。事实也确实如此。插头没有加固或保护。如果他们使用某种更常见的普通USB端口会更好。

总的来说，清洁和重新组装的麻烦比使用本身还多。由于电源线在不到一个月的时间里就坏了，我不得不申请退款。

标题: No es malo, pero tampoco bueno
内容:
La sensación de uso no es del todo cómoda.
El material del que está hecho es muy duro y puede llegar a lastimar si no usas suficiente lubricante.
Si lo usas con tu pareja hazlo con mucho cuidado y suavidad.
Puede que haya a personas que les guste mucho por esas caracteristicas de dureza en el material, pero a mi no me gustó mucho.
No es mal juguete, pero no creo que sea para todo el mundo.
Su precio también me parece elevado para lo que es y su tamaño.
Ya tengo algunos meses con este juguete y otras de las cosas que no me gustó fue que con el tiempo comenzó a tomar un color medio amarillento, similar a los case o forros transparentes de los celulares, tal vez no se note tanto en las fotos, pero eso también me genera cierta inseguridad al usarlo ahora, y si, si lo labo muy bien y lo tengo en un lugar seguro y seco.
内容评价-翻译: 使用感不是很舒服。制作它的材料非常硬，如果不使用足够的润滑剂可能会造成伤害。如果你和伴侣一起使用，一定要非常小心和轻柔。可能有些人会因为材料的硬度这些特点而非常喜欢它，但我不是很喜欢。它不是个坏玩具，但我觉得它并不适合所有人。就其本身和尺寸而言，我觉得它的价格也偏高。这个玩具我已经用了几个月了，另一件让我不喜欢的事情是，随着时间的推移，它开始变成一种半黄色，类似于手机的透明保护壳或保护套，也许在照片中不那么明显，但这也让我现在使用它时感到有些不安全，而且，是的，我确实清洗得很干净，并且把它放在安全干燥的地方。

标题: Decent budget option but there are better upgrades
内容: For less than $30 this is honestly just okay. If you’re on a budget it’ll get the job done and it’s probably one of the closer budget options to a more premium feel, but it’s nothing special. The vibration doesn’t really add a whole lot and the overall experience is just average. Personally I’d recommend either grabbing a simple non-vibrating sleeve in the $15–20 range which can feel just as good, or saving up a bit more for something higher quality. If you move up in price you can get a small doll that feels great (just more cleanup), or an official Fleshlight which is easily one of the best options under $100. This isn’t terrible, just kind of middle of the road for the price.
内容评价-翻译: 不到30美元的话，说实话也就一般般。如果你预算有限，它能勉强应付，可能是预算范围内最接近高端质感的选择之一，但没什么特别之处。震动功能没什么太大作用，整体体验就是普通水平。个人建议要么买15-20美元左右的简单无震动套筒，感觉也一样好，要么多存点钱买质量更好的。如果提高预算，你可以买到感觉很棒的小玩偶（就是清理起来麻烦点），或者官方的Fleshlight，这绝对是100美元以下的最佳选择之一。这个产品不算差，只是就这个价格而言，只能算中等水平。

标题: This is unreturnable so be sure you know what you're getting before you order.
内容: Buttons don't always work properly. Suction won't shut off unless machine is turned off and back on.. buttons do not progress as advertised. Pressing a button does not advance to the next setting with one press. Sometimes the button has to be pressed several times to get it to respond. Overall the machine has proper suction, good stroke and good rotation. The vibration function is basically a combination of stroke and rotation. Battery seems to last a reasonable amount of time. Not a bad purchase if you're willing to deal with the kinks..  I also think that the fact that it is unreturnable should be more readily visible before purchase.
内容评价-翻译: 按钮并不总是正常工作。除非关闭机器再重新打开，否则吸力不会停止。按钮没有像宣传的那样正常切换。按一次按钮无法切换到下一个设置。有时需要按好几次按钮才有反应。总的来说，这台机器吸力正常，冲程和旋转都不错。振动功能基本上是冲程和旋转的组合。电池续航时间似乎还可以。如果你愿意处理这些小毛病，这不算一个糟糕的购买。我还认为，它不可退货这一事实应该在购买前更醒目地显示出来。

This isn't my first one of these types so I know how it's supposed to work. Suck and the release then repeat the cycle. This one sucks. Pauses. Then sucks some more and keeps trying to repeat. 内容: Waste of money. Made for small knobs. Once I managed to cram it in there with half a bottle of lube, it tried to twist me apart. The motor is only strong enough to spin if I just barely have the tip in, otherwise it binds up. The suction is nice but again the size is too small to use it comfortably. Don’t buy this if you’re bigger than like 5 inches. Super disappointed. If it was the right size it would actually be pretty sweet

标题: Used to be great, now it’s a flop
内容: This is my second one I purchased and I am SO DISAPPOINTED. The original was waaaay better than the version they have now. They no longer have vibration, which was the whole reason I ordered this one again because the vibrators were so good. They no longer provide a silicone band to go over the internal component (over the hollow side openings) to keep that part snug, so when I have the outter shell on it malfunctions or gets caught up because the jelly starts pushing out of the side. I also think they made the inner part shorter, which doesn’t work for my length. It keeps getting stuck and malfunctioning, and if the suction is on it becomes basically useless because it completely stops the whole machine. Updates all for the sake of an “ai visualizer.” Ai improvements are not always needed or good, so, yea. Bad update.
内容评价-翻译: 这是我购买的第二个，我太失望了。原来的版本比现在的版本好太多了。它们不再有振动功能，而这正是我再次订购它的全部原因，因为之前的振动效果非常好。它们不再提供一个硅胶带套在内部组件上（盖住中空的侧开口）来保持那个部分贴合，所以当我装上外壳时，它会出现故障或卡住，因为凝胶开始从侧面挤出来。我还觉得他们把内部部分做短了，这不符合我的长度。它总是卡住并出现故障，如果开启吸力，它基本上就没用了，因为这会让整个机器完全停止工作。所有的更新都是为了一个“人工智能可视化器”。人工智能的改进并不总是必要或有益的，所以，是的。糟糕的更新。

标题: Good in a pinch but don't expect miracles
内容:
I see so many 5 star reviews on here for this product and am wondering how so?
Here is an honest unbiased review from a male who has actually used this:
Received this early in the day, opened and put to use later that evening.
I am a male who is approximately seven inches in length and an inch and a half to two inches in girth when erect. I found this product material to be much too soft and delivers minimal sensations. I first entered the larger side which did not do all that much for me , entering the side with the smaller orifice proved a little better sensation, but not all that much, eventually it got the job done but is no where near what I expected , especially after reading all the rave reviews on here.
The sensations are not what was described in the product description or reviews as the ridges inside the orifice's can hardly be felt even while squeezing during use, cupping your hand over the opposite orifice when using does create some suction but nothing real powerful. Had this product been made with "firmer" material I believe the sensations could have been much, much better. The product overall quality seems ok , provided it is cleaned and stored properly but dont expect it to last forever.
As far as it's overall size , the length is perfect for my size however the overall circumference I found a little cumbersome, it's much too thick.
Guys, if you are looking for something to use in a pinch other that your hands. it'll do but if you are like me and are looking for those long "sessions" with a lot of feeling and sensation you may want to look further than this product. I guess for the price, one could not expect anything more. This will go in the drawer to use for those quick sessions but I am going to have to spend a little more to find something to get that big bang. Women, if you are looking for a backup for your man, do yourself a favor, look a little further.
As far as packaging and delivery , it was delivered discreetly , all the packaging was is a solid black box with the product wrapped in plastic inside.
内容评价-翻译:
我看到这里有很多关于这个产品的五星好评，想知道怎么会这样？
这是一个真正使用过这个产品的男性的诚实、无偏见的评价：
白天早些时候收到了这个产品，晚上打开并开始使用。
我是一名男性，勃起时长度约7英寸，周长1.5到2英寸。我发现这个产品的材料太软了，带来的快感非常少。我首先尝试了较大的那一侧，没什么感觉，然后尝试了较小的开口那一侧，感觉稍微好一点，但也没好多少。最终它确实完成了任务，但远没有达到我的预期，尤其是在看了这里所有的好评之后。
实际的快感与产品描述或评论中所说的不符，即使在使用时挤压，也几乎感觉不到开口内部的纹路。使用时用手捂住对面的开口确实会产生一些吸力，但并不强。如果这个产品用“更硬”的材料制作，我相信快感会好很多很多。产品的整体质量看起来还可以，只要正确清洁和存放，但别指望它能永远用下去。
至于整体尺寸，长度对我来说很合适，但整体周长我觉得有点笨重，太厚了。
伙计们，如果你只是想临时找个代替手的东西，它还能用。但如果你和我一样，想要那种有很多感觉和快感的长时间“体验”，你可能需要再看看其他产品。我想就这个价格而言，也不能期望更多了。这个会被放进抽屉，用于那些快速的体验，但我得再花点钱去找能带来那种强烈快感的东西。女士们，如果你在为你的伴侣找一个备用用品，帮自己一个忙，再看看其他的吧。
至于包装和配送，配送很隐蔽，所有的包装就是一个纯黑色的盒子，里面的产品用塑料包裹着。

内容:
It works.  It is a basic model.  No vibrator (Though there is a pouch where you can insert one).  The main issue is that once you are pass the opening, it is very, very loose (and I'm not a small guy). I think you're supposed the grasp the sides and squeeze in with your hand to make it tighter.  However, that eliminates the possibility of hands-free action.  This was replacing a similar model that was much more fulfilling.  I would suggest looking elsewhere.  It definitely is cheap though!

Edited:  I saw all the positive reviews here.  I'm glad it works for others.  I think people may be getting different models though as some of the pics here (of the inside turned inside out) are different than mine.  One image shows lots of bumps and ridges, as the top quality male toys have.  The one I received is very smooth.  The smoothness works, but it's not as good as other models or the real thing.
内容评价-翻译:
它能用。这是一个基础款。没有振动器（不过有一个小袋子可以插入一个）。主要问题是一旦进入开口，里面就非常、非常松（而且我尺寸不算小）。我想你应该抓住两侧，用手挤压来让它变紧。然而，这就排除了双手解放的可能性。这是在替代一个类似但体验好得多的型号。我建议你看看别的。不过它确实很便宜！

编辑：我看到这里有很多好评。很高兴它对其他人有效。不过我觉得人们可能收到的是不同的型号，因为这里的一些图片（里面翻出来的样子）和我的不一样。有一张图片显示有很多凸起和纹路，就像高端男性玩具那样。我收到的这个非常光滑。光滑的也能用，但不如其他型号或真实体验好。

内容:
This one just wasn’t for me. It feels more geared toward younger guys who are looking for something quick and simple, not really for grown men who know what they like.

I gave it a fair try, but honestly… it was boring. The vibration alone didn’t do much. I kept thinking maybe if it had some type of suction or more advanced features, it would’ve made a difference—but as it is, it just didn’t hit.

It seems like it’s designed for quick gratification rather than a quality experience, and that’s not what I’m looking for. I tried to give it a chance, but it’s definitely a no for me.

And yeah… once you’ve used it, returning it probably isn’t even an option, so that’s a loss right there.

Overall: not impressed. Wouldn’t recommend if you’re looking for something more satisfying or well-designed.
内容评价-翻译:
这个不适合我。它感觉更面向那些寻求快速简单体验的年轻男性，不太适合知道自己喜好的成年男性。

我给了它一个公平的尝试，但说实话……很无聊。单靠震动没什么效果。我一直在想，如果它有某种吸力或更高级的功能，可能会有所不同——但就目前而言，它就是没达到预期。

它似乎是为了快速满足而设计的，而不是提供优质体验，这不是我想要的。我试图给它一个机会，但肯定不适合我。

而且……一旦用过，可能就没法退货了，所以这本身就是一种损失。

总体来说：没什么印象。如果你在寻找更令人满意或设计精良的产品，不推荐这款。

标题: Decent Vibes but Flimsy Material and Tricky Cleanup
内容: The product came in discrete packaging which is great. The vibration motor is powerful enough for a good time. Cleaning the device was a bit complicated as the silicone was sticking to itself and I struggled cleaning the inside. After letting it dry, I noticed that the material was already starting to tear and not very strong (as seen in photos). It is long enough for a 7 inch male. The lube that came with it was ok at best, after around 5 minutes it started drying up and becoming a bit sticky on my shlong and made my meat pretty sensitive to the material of the vibrator. I did have a good time using it but the statements I made above ruined the experience a little.
内容评价-翻译: 产品的包装是不透明的，这点很好。震动马达的功率足够带来愉悦体验。清洁设备有点复杂，因为硅胶会粘在一起，而且我很难清洁内部。晾干后，我发现材料已经开始撕裂，不够坚固（如照片所示）。对于7英寸的男性来说，它的长度足够。附带的润滑剂最多只能说还行，大约5分钟后就开始变干，在我的阴茎上变得有点黏，而且让我的生殖器对震动器的材料变得相当敏感。我使用它时确实有过愉快的体验，但我上面提到的这些问题让体验打了点折扣。

标题: functions as described but doesn’t do anything very well
内容:
Worked as described but I wasn’t wowed by any feature. Vibration was very disappointing— really weak and not “deep”.
Suction was ok but I’ve seen better at lower price points— also seemed notably reduced when using the spinning feature.

Cleaning— while very possible due to design, is a bit of a nightmare—- the center acts as centrifuge and flings everything everywhere inside. Plan on completely disassembling this for every single cleaning.

Hard to keep properly lubricated when oriented vertically it all ends up in your lap. Which compounds the smooth difficult to grip nature of the product shape.

Never ran out of batteries before throwing it away, but I got the sense that manufacturer claims may have been overstated— an hour seemed optimistic.

The material is really very soft – – too soft for me personally, there wasn’t much in the way of sensation provided.

The ability to use suction while filled with water was pretty cool to be honest and earned it three stars vs lower. It wasn’t enough to put me over the edge, but I briefly considered modifying the device to have a constant flow of water. As designed you get a 2 minute period before all of the water has been suctioned out (and lube with it).

Also despite the illustrations the tongue is not powered and just flops around.

I threw it away after less than 10 uses— just wasn’t for me.
内容评价-翻译:
正如描述的那样工作，但没有任何功能让我惊艳。振动非常令人失望——真的很弱，而且不“深沉”。

吸力还可以，但我见过价格更低但吸力更好的——使用旋转功能时，吸力似乎明显减弱。

清洁方面——虽然设计上可以清洁，但有点麻烦——中心部分像离心机一样，会把所有东西都甩得到处都是。每次清洁都要把它完全拆开。

垂直放置时很难保持适当的润滑，润滑剂都会流到腿上。这加剧了产品形状本身就难以抓握的问题。

在扔掉它之前，电池还没用完，但我感觉制造商的说法可能言过其实——一个小时似乎太乐观了。

材质真的非常软——对我个人来说太软了，没有提供太多的感觉。

说实话，在装满水的情况下使用吸力这个功能还挺酷的，这让它得了三星而不是更低的分数。这还不足以让我彻底满意，但我曾短暂考虑过修改这个设备，让它能持续流水。按照设计，两分钟后所有的水（还有润滑剂）就会被吸光。

另外，尽管有插图，但舌头是没有动力的，只是晃来晃去。

用了不到10次我就把它扔了——它不适合我。

内容:
I have used this model for a couple years now.  I have found that this particular model has the best feel, (action). I have yet to find another product that works better and does everything this does for the price.  It feels amazing, tight, with suction and vibration all at the same time. Lots of selections.
However, having said that, I wish they lasted longer. I may get 1-2 months with it working properly.  But after about a month, it starts malfunctioning. Usually the 1st thing to go is the vibration. The little bullets either break off the wires or just stops. Also, connecting port becomes loose and will not allow the connectors to touch. Next, the vacuum intensity fades, and eventually the whole thing just won’t turn on or charge.
内容评价-翻译:
我已经使用这款模型好几年了。我发现这款特定的模型手感最好，（动作）也最出色。就这个价格而言，我还没找到另一款产品能比它更好用，并且能做到它所做的一切。它的感觉很棒，紧致，同时具有吸力和振动。有很多选择。

然而，话虽如此，我希望它们能更耐用一些。它正常工作的时间可能只有1-2个月。但大约一个月后，它就开始出现故障。通常首先出问题的是振动功能。小震子要么线断了，要么就直接停止工作。此外，连接端口会变松，导致连接器无法接触。接下来，真空吸力会减弱，最终整个设备无法开机或充电。

标题: This needs improvement, but has good potential .
内容:
Problems: Very poor assembly instruction and no operation instructions. Suction failed on second use. The vibration motor disconnected, it still vibrates, just not attached so it just makes noise.

The unit is heavy and bulky.

The Good: felt great when all features were working.

This unit is easy to clean.
Charges quickly and will run for almost an hour.
The body of the unit is well built.

Conclusion: I really wanted to like this. It is my first sex toy. Sadly with the lackbof durability, I cannot recommend.

这个产品又重又笨重。

优点：当所有功能都正常工作时，感觉很棒。

这个产品易于清洁。
充电很快，能运行将近一个小时。
产品机身做工精良。

结论：我真的很想喜欢它。这是我的第一个性玩具。遗憾的是，由于缺乏耐用性，我无法推荐。

标题: Nice when and if it works .
内容:
So the 1st one I purchased made a terrible screaching grinding sound and did nothing else. I did contact C. S. Who did reply promptly via email, offered to replace the defective product with a new and upgraded model when they arrived, Great! But I never received another or was ever contacted again. Now ..  a month later a foolishly purchased another which was amazing and performed exactly as advertised! Two times.
I did not contact C. S. Again as I just felt like it was my stupidity for believing I was just unfortunate with the previous defect.
I would have been willing to try a new and upgraded model, the representative was great, this was about a year ago and there are a few more options now with similar products and I recommend trying them first.
内容评价-翻译: 所以我买的第一个发出可怕的刮擦研磨声，除此之外什么都做不了。我确实联系了客服，他们通过电子邮件迅速回复，提出在新产品到货后用新的升级型号更换有缺陷的产品，太好了！但我再也没有收到另一个，也没有再被联系过。现在……一个月后，我愚蠢地又买了一个，这个很棒，完全按照宣传的那样工作！两次都是。我没有再联系客服，因为我觉得自己太傻了，竟然相信之前的缺陷只是我运气不好。我本来愿意尝试新的升级型号，那个代表很棒，这大约是一年前的事了，现在有更多类似的产品可供选择，我建议先试试它们。

标题: Good value for the price, mine stopped charging after 10 months
内容: Mine started having charging problems after several months. You had to jiggle and hold the connector just right - replacing the cable had the same problem - so this was a problem with the charging port on the device. That said, I used it for 10 months for maybe a total of 30 times. Given the price, I suppose that's not bad. I'm a bit larger than normal, and it would benefit from a bit more power (or diameter) and depth to reduce friction and enhance the experience. A more reliable charging port would make this a 5 star review.
内容评价-翻译: 我的用了几个月后开始出现充电问题。必须摇晃并把连接器固定在特定位置才行——换了数据线也一样——所以问题出在设备的充电口上。话虽如此，我用了10个月，大概总共用了30次。考虑到价格，我觉得还行。我比一般人块头大一点，它要是能再有点动力（或者直径再大一点）、深度再深一点就好了，可以减少摩擦，提升体验。如果充电口更可靠，这绝对是五星好评。

标题: Save your money and spend it on something else.
内容:
So first things first, the sleeve itself isn't the most comfortable, it's fairly rigid and small. So take that how you will. I've gotten better toys for less money. The vibration is lacking, not the strongest, but not the weakest eitehr. The fact that I had to actually think of a proper word shows how bad it is. I mean it's not as bad as some toys on the market, but it's certainly not the best. I'd return it if I could.

About the only upside to this is how easy it is to clean.

唯一的优点大概就是清洁起来很方便。

标题: Basically a jackhammer with very little adjustability
内容:
Can't control vibration and oscillation independently.
Only a single slider.
Starts out hard/fast and only goes harder/faster.
Severely disappointed and strongly prefer the Domi 2 over this
Reviews suggest being able to use this to edge or train stamina, but the opposite is true. It goes hard with no mercy.
Maybe mine is defective, but the lowest setting feels like high and turning it up barely changes it at all.
This toy is basically a jackhammer at best.
If you're looking to edge I highly recommend you look elsewhere. This toy is not for edging.
It's also MUCH louder than the Domi 2.
内容评价-翻译:
无法独立控制振动和摆动。
只有一个滑块。
一开始就很强烈/快速，而且只会变得更强烈/快速。
非常失望，强烈偏好Domi 2而不是这个。
评论称可以用它来边缘刺激或训练耐力，但事实恰恰相反。它毫不留情地强烈震动。
也许我的这个有缺陷，但最低设置感觉像高设置，调大几乎没有变化。
这个玩具充其量基本上就是个电钻。
如果你想进行边缘刺激，我强烈建议你考虑其他产品。这个玩具不适合边缘刺激。
它也比Domi 2吵得多。

标题: Not the best. Read my review.
内容: I'm mixed on my opinion of this product. I primarily bought it for the suction feature. What suction?! If your buying it for the suction then don't buy it at all. The thrusting is better then others I've tried. The vibrator is about average. The soft internals have a strong almost bad odor. It kind of reminds me of spoiled milk. It does disassemble easily for cleaning. Just remember you can't return it if your not satisfied. It does get the job done but I'm not wowed. I hope this helps someone in making their purchase decision.
内容评价-翻译: 我对这个产品的评价很复杂。我主要是冲着它的吸吮功能买的。哪有什么吸吮力？如果你是为了吸吮功能买它，那完全别买。它的抽动功能比我试过的其他产品好。振动功能大概中等水平。柔软的内部有一股强烈的、几乎可以说是难闻的气味。有点让我想起变质的牛奶。它很容易拆卸清洗。记住，如果你不满意是不能退货的。它确实能完成任务，但我并不惊艳。希望这能帮助到某些人做购买决定。

内容: Texture is not bad at all, definitely had worse. Problem is, I guess I'm somewhat of a stallion because I ended up going at it at a rather leisurely pace and ended up having the bit that holds the suction cup break off after my 2nd use, which kinda negates the whole purpose of why I bought it in the first place, beyond that it is rather noisy and not in the fun way, just a constant repeat of air being pushed out of the hole on the bottom. 标题: Firm. Suction cup is a practical joke
内容: Material is straight up firm/hard. Too bad, because the shape is fun and stimulating. It's small too. The hole is like as big as a pen. Ask yourself, if this product was any good, would it be sold this cheap? You need to cut it right off the bat, if you intend to enter it without it strangling you. The material is just too firm to enjoy. I shoved a beer can into it, and left it for a few days, hoping that would stretch it out, watch kind of worked. The novelty of the suction cup is awfully executed. Too firm and too tight a seal to let air past your Willie as you try to enter, so it just 'rejects you' when you try to enter it with the plastic case on it. The case ruins it. Take it out if the case, put a beer can in it for a few days... Then it's usable. But only barely. It's just to tight.
内容评价-翻译: 材质非常坚硬。太可惜了，因为形状有趣又刺激。它也很小。洞口像钢笔那么大。问问自己，如果这个产品真的好，会卖这么便宜吗？如果你想进去而不被勒到，你需要马上切掉它。材质太硬了，根本无法享受。我把一个啤酒罐塞进去，放了几天，希望能把它撑大一点，有点效果。吸盘的新奇设计执行得非常糟糕。当你试图进入时，密封太硬太紧，空气无法通过你的阴茎，所以当你戴着塑料外壳试图进入时，它只会“拒绝你”。外壳毁了它。把它从外壳里拿出来，放个啤酒罐进去几天……然后它就可以用了。但也只是勉强能用。还是太紧了。

标题: Rigid material, too tight, does not stretch, cannot return
内容:
The material is rigid and not elastic at all. The channel is very tight, which would be fine if the material can stretch a little when you enter, but it does not. I put a lot of lubricant but does not work. It completely ruins my mood and give me an ED. There are some comments that reflect similar issues. I wish I had read them. Also keep it in mind it does not allow return.

Update:
I still keep my previous review but increase from 1 star to 2 stars. the seller gave me full refund without return. It is a safe purchase. Go ahead if you want to try. And if you do not like it, return or get a refund. I appreciate the service for unsatisfied customers.
内容评价-翻译:
这种材料很坚硬，完全没有弹性。通道非常紧，如果材料在进入时能稍微拉伸一点的话还可以，但它完全不行。我涂了很多润滑剂，但没用。这彻底破坏了我的心情，还让我勃起功能障碍。有一些评论反映了类似的问题。我真希望当初读过这些评论。另外要记住，它不允许退货。

更新：
我仍然保留之前的评价，但从1星增加到2星。卖家在没有退货的情况下给了我全额退款。这是一次安全的购买。如果你想尝试，可以入手。如果你不喜欢，可以退货或获得退款。我很欣赏对不满意客户的服务。

标题: Don't Waste Your Money - Incredibly Frustrating
内容:
Heat function is non existent, left it on for a half hour and there was no noticeable difference.

Ai Sync app is poorly designed and the content is abysmal.

The sleeve is loose, even if you're on the girthier side & provides very little stimulation. Also, it easily dislodges from the device itself. You will spend more time adjusting it and trying to keep it in place than it's worth.

The UI is not intuitive in the slightest and you have to cycle through all the settings to get back to whichever works best for you. The buttons are also very touch sensitive and you will accidentally cycle through them unexpectedly.

Overall, it strokes but not well. It's more of a hassle than a treat.

Buy this only if you enjoy being cucked by terrible design and function.
内容评价-翻译:
加热功能完全不存在，开了半个小时也没有明显变化。

Ai Sync应用设计糟糕，内容质量极差。

套筒很松，即使你体型较壮也几乎没有刺激感。而且它很容易从设备上脱落。你花在调整和固定它上的时间会远超其使用价值。

用户界面一点也不直观，你必须浏览所有设置才能回到最适合你的那个。按钮也非常敏感，你会不小心意外切换设置。

总的来说，它能震动，但效果不好。与其说是享受，不如说是麻烦。

只有当你喜欢被糟糕的设计和功能折磨时，才买这个。

内容:
Product not as described. AI/Syncing is to videos In a poorly designed app. Donut holes, legos and the occasional girl in skimpy clothing (nothing nude) to sync to. The AI is a joke if you’ve used modern AI chats I’m not sure how it even qualifies for AI on the label.

The toy itself is loose. I’m average size and girth and have used fleshlights in the past. This feels like chucking a hotdog down a hallway. The only nice aspect of this device is the motor is reasonably quiet. Still noticeable but reasonably quieter. The heating aspect is also nice.

Negatives-

Does not sync with content from major sites
Feels loose
App is terrible
Short stroke length

Positives-
Heating is surprisingly good
USB C charging
Motor is reasonably quiet

Wish I had just bought a fleshlight for this price range.

If you do purchase you can mod the sleeve by putting multiple rubber bands around it. Note even when you do this the texture on the inside of the sleeve is lacking and doesn’t stimulate very much.
内容评价-翻译:
产品与描述不符。AI/同步功能是针对视频的，但应用设计糟糕。要同步的内容包括甜甜圈洞、乐高玩具，偶尔还有穿着暴露的女孩（没有裸体）。如果你用过现代AI聊天，这个所谓的AI简直就是个笑话，我都不确定它怎么有资格在标签上标为AI。

玩具本身很松。我尺寸和周长都属于平均水平，过去也用过飞机杯。这个感觉就像把热狗扔进走廊。这个设备唯一的优点是马达相当安静。还是能听到，但确实比较安静。加热功能也不错。

缺点：

不能与主流网站的内容同步
感觉很松
应用很糟糕
冲程长度短

优点：
加热效果出奇地好
USB-C充电
马达相当安静

要是这个价格范围，我还不如买个飞机杯。

如果你确实购买了，可以通过在套筒上套多个橡皮筋来改装。注意，即使这样做，套筒内部的纹理仍然不足，刺激感不强。

标题: Weak, small and cheap. Don’t waste your money
内容:
The cup is cheap silicone even extra lubed. The friction will make the silicone start peeling and bawling up. This is not made for anyone who is thick or tapered. The motor in medium and high speeds is strong for thicker men., but all these fancy low speed patterns don’t work if you’re thick. There’s not enough torque, even at a full charge.
This has promised, but for this price point you expect something a little bit more powerful.
内容评价-翻译: 这个杯子是廉价的硅胶材质，即使额外涂抹了润滑剂。摩擦会使硅胶开始剥落并卷成一团。它不适合那些尺寸较粗或呈锥形的人。对于较粗的男性来说，中速和高速模式下的马达动力很强，但如果你尺寸较粗，所有这些花哨的低速模式都不起作用。即使充满电，扭矩也不够。这产品有承诺，但在这个价格点，你会期望它更强大一些。

内容: This thing can thump but it has warts.  Sleeve is a bit short for me to get deep.  Biggest issue I have is button type and placement.  They are touch sensitive, aligned very close to each other so it is very easy to turn it on when just picking it up.  Often times right in the middle of a session, I inadvertently hit a button either turning it off or changing current mode which can be quite frustrating.  This thing can go like 100mph so it gets kinda crazy and trying to hold on hitting a button on accident is easy.  App seems ok but I have not used it because this thing is so big it really requires two hands to hold it.
内容评价-翻译: 这东西能震动，但有瑕疵。对于我来说，握把有点短，没法深入。我最大的问题是按钮的类型和位置。它们是触控式的，彼此排列得非常近，所以拿起它的时候很容易误开机。很多时候，在使用过程中，我会不经意地按到按钮，要么关机，要么切换当前模式，这真的很让人沮丧。这东西能达到100英里每小时的速度，所以会变得有点失控，而且在努力握住它的时候很容易不小心按到按钮。应用程序看起来还可以，但我没用过，因为这东西太大了，确实需要两只手来拿。

内容: This is an extremely fancy toy. From the box it comes in to the product itself is top quality. The lighting on the inside is also extremely impressive and warm. The tpe material feels soft and spongey but it's too...open? Realistically speaking, you shouldn't be able to insert a finger and not touch the sides. So with that, it's a bit loose for an average guy. The pumping action it really neat with a ton of settings but the motor itself can't handle much friction at all. Even with lubrication, the little bit of friction will slow the motor don't to a halt. The app is easy to install and follow and makes the experience more engaging. Overall, I can tell that a lot of thought and care went into the creation of this product. It is a very high-end top choice item, it's just for me personally, the low strength motor and looseness of the item made this difficult to use. The cool part is that it does look like a fancy coffee cup if you accidentally leave it out lol
内容评价-翻译: 这是一个非常精致的玩具。从包装到产品本身都是顶级品质。内部的灯光也非常令人印象深刻且温暖。TPE材料摸起来柔软有弹性，但它太……开放了？说实话，你不应该能插入一根手指却碰不到内壁。因此，对于普通男性来说，它有点松。它的抽吸功能非常巧妙，有很多设置，但电机本身根本无法承受太多摩擦。即使使用润滑剂，一点点摩擦也会让电机减速直至停止。应用程序易于安装和操作，让体验更具吸引力。总的来说，我能看出在这款产品的制作上投入了很多心思和心血。它是一款非常高端的首选产品，只是对我个人而言，电机强度低和产品的松动使其难以使用。有趣的是，如果你不小心把它放在外面，它看起来确实像一个精致的咖啡杯，哈哈。

内容:
Apparently, I’ve had a difficult time in writing a review that would be allowed to be posted. I’ve tried to be as discreet as possible. So I’m just gonna say that this doesn’t work well at all. It is too short. It doesn’t feel good. And it is very unwieldy, impossible to hold correctly because the mechanism is on the outside rather than being internal.

It is pretty well made for this kind of item. It’s heavy and solid. Touchscreen buddies are almost impossible to use and you have to be able to see them or you have no idea what you are pressing. That doesn’t work well for this kind of item. The buttons themselves are very finicky as well as you can see in the video.

The bottom line is it is not well suited to purpose. It doesn’t feel good and is nearly impossible to use and control.

It’s not the kind of thing that lends itself to returns so if you buy it, that’s a $70 risk and you’re not getting it back.
内容评价-翻译:
显然，我很难写出一篇能被允许发布的评论。我已经尽量谨慎了。所以我只能说，这东西完全不好用。它太短了。手感很差。而且非常笨重，根本没法正确握持，因为机械装置在外面而不是内部。

对于这种类型的产品来说，它的做工还算不错。它很重，很结实。触摸屏伙伴几乎没法用，你必须能看到它们，否则根本不知道按的是什么。这对这种类型的产品来说不太好用。正如你在视频中看到的，按钮本身也非常不灵敏。

总而言之，它不太适合其用途。手感不好，几乎无法使用和控制。

这不是那种容易退货的东西，所以如果你买了，那就是70美元的风险，而且你拿不回来。

标题: I developed a bad skin rash as a result of using this item
内容:
I've tried this in the past but it was not the same brad and was better made.  This thing gave me a rash of colors, none of them natural in a place a man really does not want a rash.  There was also an itch that lasted a few days further indicating my skin in that area was irritiated.  I've tried several  toys and never had a reaction.

Also I never buy any types of lube other than water based only and I always wash with cold water and gentle, all natural soap.  I might have missed a little bit but a little water based lube on a brand new silicone item should not create any kind of reaction or breakdown of material.  The thing is the same day I noticed my rash this thing was literally melting back into a black liquid within the plastic bag I was using to store it in.  When I say plastic back I'm taking the soft which plastic bags used to cover Onaholes within the box they come in.
内容评价-翻译:

内容:
I have used and bought over a Dozen of these automatic masturbator.  This is by far near the worst one I brought.  I bought it because I cant get my go to one. I'm much bigger than most with girth but average length.  Besides not feeling good it would not turn off vibration once powered down.

Only would feel good if the vibration and twisting would work like you think it would.  Vibration,  that isn't even close to other brands.  It also is inserted into the bottom of the sleeve.  To clean the sleeve you need to pull it out. It's attached by a wire which will break. Went through that type in the past and end result is the break of

Don't buy unless you got a thin tool 9" long.  Maybe and just maybe you we enjoy.

I wouldn't even recommend buying in any case

除非你有一个9英寸长的细工具，否则不要买。也许，只是也许你会喜欢。

无论如何我都不推荐购买

内容:
The cage inside that wraps around the insert and strokes only reaches down maybe 2/3rds of the insertable length, meaning the base couple inches are not stimulated at all, only the deepest 3-4 inches or so.

If you are longer than average you will bottom out and the motor will stall, making it only effective at light or partial insertion. Being around 7 inches I found that going hard at all would result in the unit ceasing to function because the piston was already pressed firmly against my head.

The slowest speed setting is far and away too fast and should likely be the middle setting, the highest setting is comically fast and probably unnecessary.

Interior texture feels a bit too aggressive for my personal taste and not particularly realistic.

Unit would need both a longer stroke and a deeper insertable length for proper stimulation from my perspective.
内容评价-翻译:
包裹着插入物并进行抽动的内部套筒可能只延伸到插入长度的约三分之二，这意味着底部的几英寸完全没有受到刺激，只有最深的3-4英寸左右会被刺激到。

如果你比平均长度长，你会触底，电机就会停转，这使得它只有在浅度或部分插入时才有效。我大约7英寸，发现只要用力插入，设备就会停止工作，因为活塞已经紧紧地压在我的头部。

最慢的速度设置还是太快了，它可能应该作为中间速度设置，最高速度设置快得滑稽，可能没有必要。

内部纹理对我个人来说感觉有点太刺激了，而且不是特别逼真。

在我看来，要获得适当的刺激，设备需要更长的冲程和更深的可插入长度。

内容: I have to say this may have been the best toy I have discovered in a very long time. I was so happy with it that I thought to myself that I wanted to order another one so that way when the battery died on the first one, I’d have a second one fully charged. Unfortunately I only got one use out of it. The vibration part of the toy just stopped working when I charged it again and tried to go for another round. The upper tongue part still works, but as I cycle through the vibrations, none of them actually do anything anymore. It’s a shame because this could have been the toy of all toys, but it didn’t seem to last after one use.
内容评价-翻译: 我不得不说，这可能是我很长一段时间以来发现的最好的玩具。我对它非常满意，以至于我心想我想再订购一个，这样当第一个的电池没电时，我就会有第二个充满电的。不幸的是，我只用了一次。当我再次给它充电并尝试再来一次时，玩具的振动部分就停止工作了。上面的舌头部分仍然可以工作，但当我切换振动模式时，它们实际上都没有任何反应了。真可惜，因为这本可以成为所有玩具中的佼佼者，但它似乎在使用一次后就不行了。

标题: Pretty good, but has a couple major issues (for me)
内容:
Good product, but definitely has some considerable flaws.
First off, this thing does what it says it will do and does it quite well…
HOWEVER, there are a few issues that make it hard to use (for me, at least) and make me kind of regret buying this specific one
1) Arguably the biggest issue I have with it is the entrance into the device. The hole is designed to squeeze (and it does), but what usually ends up happening is that the whole silicone piece comes off and then my member gets a nice hard scrape on the plastic edges there and let me tell you what… IT HURTS. I’ve had to try and take it slow on the thrusts otherwise I get a nice surprise from that happening, so it kind of limits things.
2) Almost as bad as the first, the second major drawback is the battery life. Maybe it’s just a defective model, but I’ll be lucky to get 30 minutes out of this thing on a full charge and trying to conserve battery using mostly just the vibration mode. Thing always seems to die right as I’m getting close, so that’s frustrating, to say the least…

I’m pretty sure I had at least one more, but those are the two main issues, which make this one a dealbreaker for me, so I guess I’ll get back to shopping around 🤷🏽♂️
内容评价-翻译:
产品不错，但确实有一些相当大的缺陷。

首先，这个东西确实如宣传所说，而且做得相当好……

然而，有几个问题让它很难使用（至少对我来说），也让我有点后悔买了这个特定的产品。

1）可以说我对它最大的不满是设备的入口。那个孔设计得需要用力挤（它也确实如此），但通常发生的情况是整个硅胶部分会脱落，然后我的阴茎会被那里的塑料边缘狠狠地刮到，跟你说……真的很疼。我必须尝试放慢抽插速度，否则就会因此得到一个“惊喜”，所以这在某种程度上限制了使用。

2）几乎和第一个问题一样糟糕，第二个主要缺点是电池续航。也许只是我的型号有问题，但就算充满电，并且尽量只使用振动模式来省电，我能用到30分钟就算幸运了。这东西总是在我快要达到高潮的时候没电，所以至少可以说，这很令人沮丧……

我很确定我至少还有一个问题，但这两个是主要问题，对我来说这让它成了一个无法接受的产品，所以我想我还是继续逛逛吧🤷🏽♂️

标题: Smells like chemistry, sounds like farts.
内容:
I won't bury the lead; the rubber toy, while inside of the case, makes terrible farting noises.

The case is too small to allow this tom fit easily, causing the contents to get crushed up into it. The material gives off strong fumes, that need time to air out. Even after washing there is a strong chemical odor. It feels soft to the touch, and takes to warming rather nicely.

Initially the color on the lips were half off and smudged over the surface. I'm suddenly wondering if the toy I got was used... (BARF!).

The little slide tab doesn't affect suction but it does affect insertion: when closed it becomes nearly impossible to achieve any meaningful probing. Also, the pressure causes the soft "guts" to press into the little hole of the tab is set to the open position, causing really loud farting sounds.

I will say that the lips look pretty, plush, and soft. There is a large tongue inside that looks swollen; not good. The lack of teeth disappoints, as the realism of those in others really makes a difference.

The fart tab, the small case; this was a really really bad design overall.
内容评价-翻译:
我就不绕弯子了；这个橡胶玩具放在盒子里的时候，会发出很难听的放屁声。

盒子太小了，导致玩具很难放进去，里面的东西都被挤变形了。材料散发出强烈的气味，需要时间通风。即使洗过之后，还是有很浓的化学气味。手感很柔软，也很容易变暖。

一开始嘴唇上的颜色就掉了一半，还蹭得到处都是。我突然怀疑我拿到的这个玩具是不是被人用过……（恶心！）。

那个小滑动开关对吸力没什么影响，但对插入有影响：关上的时候几乎没办法进行任何有效的深入。而且，当开关处于打开位置时，压力会导致柔软的“内部结构”被压进开关的小孔里，从而发出非常响亮的放屁声。

不得不说，嘴唇看起来很漂亮，毛绒绒的，也很柔软。里面有一个大舌头，看起来肿肿的，不太好。没有牙齿这点很让人失望，因为其他玩具里的牙齿带来的真实感真的很重要。

这个“放屁开关”，还有这个小盒子；总的来说，这真的是一个非常糟糕的设计。

内容: It's not what I expected it to be for the price I bought this item with a  middle of the road price which I consider higher price seeing as the ones above it are over $200  it takes 150 minutes to charge the battery that barely lasts 20 minutes it's disappointing and the motor was great right out the box now it's pretty pathetic the vibrations are strong but the selection of modes isn't very good either they all seem like a different version of two styles and mechanical on delivery. So not very impressive at all also the warmer that's built into the lid never worked and that app it's supposed to connect to that they say does all the amazing things either can't find it or doesn't recognize the device I have a similar item from a diffenrt company that was half the price and is still going strong after 2 years that the app couldn't find either the only thing this has going for it is how tight the sleeves are but those also don't work right becuse the machine will suck them into itself which is very annoying  you would think that would be a good thing well it's not the thickness of thr walls of the sleeves I think prevents alot of the suction from being delivered to the user and the heads if you will of each sleeve are to thin to hold in place so they get sucked into the device .  My recommendation is do not buy this device. It's like the components of this device e were rejected at another company and bought by this one who put it together and sold it anyway
内容评价-翻译: 这个东西的价格处于中等水平，但考虑到比它贵的那些都要200多美元，我觉得这个价格算高了，结果却不是我期望的样子。电池充电需要150分钟，却只能勉强用20分钟，太令人失望了。电机刚开箱时还不错，现在却变得很糟糕。振动强度很大，但模式选择也不太好，它们似乎都像是两种风格的不同版本，而且是机械按键的。所以整体给人的印象一点都不好。盖子上内置的加热器也从来没工作过，还有那个据说能连接并实现各种神奇功能的应用程序，要么找不到，要么无法识别设备。我有一个来自另一家公司的类似产品，价格只有一半，用了两年还好好的，那个应用程序也找不到设备。这个东西唯一的优点就是套筒很紧，但它们也不好用，因为机器会把它们吸进去，非常烦人。你可能会觉得紧是好事，但事实并非如此。我认为套筒壁的厚度阻碍了很多吸力传递到用户身上，而且每个套筒的头部（如果你愿意这么称呼的话）太薄，无法固定，所以会被吸进设备里。我的建议是不要买这个设备。这就像是其他公司拒收的零部件被这家公司买走，然后组装起来卖掉的一样。

内容: The app seams like a complete scam, read Google reviews on app before buying, after last update most ppl lost the in app currency they had and haven't been helped, if you don't trust Google you have no choice as Google forces you to download the app from the play store even if you go to the companies site and download the apk, the moment you load it then it redirects you to Google play without letting you select log in with account, Google seams to be the biggest down side to this product from my personal experience and research, not sure why the company would allow Google to force ppl to download from them and not allow the companies apk file to work independently... Research before you buy the hardware could be awesome but you'll never know what the apps like unless you sign your life away to Google and pay a bunch of money that could be taken at any time....texture seams awesome tho and the design seams solid but I wouldn't buy if the app is the reason because you'll be disappointed
内容评价-翻译: 这个应用程序看起来完全是个骗局，购买前先看看谷歌上的应用评论吧。上次更新后，大多数人都丢失了应用内的虚拟货币，而且问题一直没有得到解决。如果你不信任谷歌，那你别无选择，因为即使你去公司网站下载APK，谷歌也会强迫你从应用商店下载。你一加载APK，它就会重定向到谷歌应用商店，不让你选择用账户登录。根据我的个人经验和调查，谷歌似乎是这个产品最大的缺点。我不明白为什么公司会允许谷歌强迫人们从应用商店下载，而不允许公司的APK文件独立运行……购买硬件前做些调查可能会不错，但除非你完全信赖谷歌并支付一大笔随时可能损失的钱，否则你永远不知道这个应用程序到底怎么样……不过，它的质地似乎很棒，设计也很扎实，但如果问题出在应用程序上，我是不会买的，因为你肯定会失望的。

内容: It arrived in very discreet packaging. The box itself is very nice, and the device appears to be well crafted. The materials feel great, it looks good, but aside from that, I can’t tell you if the product itself is good. Vibration setting doesn’t work. Rotation setting seems ok, but seems to get hung up every few seconds for no discernible reason. The suction setting seemed to work fine as it was going down, then got stuck and never went back up, so I really can’t use it. I am average length I guess (a little over 6in) but I do have above average girth, which may or may not be the problem. Since one feature didn’t work at all, one worked for a second, and the third worked with issues, I’m wondering if I just got a faulty device. Also, much heavier than expected, and the rotation was way louder than I care for. If you want to use this without anyone knowing, I assure you everyone in the house will hear it.
内容评价-翻译: 它的包装非常隐蔽。盒子本身很漂亮，设备看起来做工精良。材料手感很好，外观也不错，但除此之外，我说不准产品本身是否好用。震动设置不起作用。旋转设置似乎还行，但每隔几秒就会无缘无故卡住。吸吮设置在下降时似乎工作正常，然后就卡住了，再也没有回升，所以我真的没法用。我想我的长度算中等（略超过6英寸），但周长比平均水平要粗，这可能是问题所在，也可能不是。既然有一个功能完全不能用，一个功能用了一下就不行了，第三个功能也有问题，我在想是不是我拿到了一个有故障的设备。而且，比预期的要重得多，旋转的声音也比我能接受的大得多。如果你想在不让别人知道的情况下使用它，我敢保证家里的每个人都会听到。

内容: If i could give it a negative 10 it would get it! Mine was total JUNK it was probably one of the worst quality products i have ever purchased! The app never worked for me! It functioned good for about 1 week of light use then The vibrator quit the 3rd or 4th time it was used then for some reason it would just stop thrusting and rotating if the vacume was above 4 and it didnt do anythjng except act like its jammed remove vacume and it starts working but this only happens some times other times you have to smack the top to get the rotation and thrust to start working! This is a poor copy of a similar machine i purchased last year and i was elated to see there was a ai version with a app i could purchase! Little did I know it was going to be this bad of a product!! I dont know why sellers waste money on intricate packageing! here feel they have to send there products in the most expensive designer packageing they can find  when i want a quality working product not a piece of garbage in a gloss and matte U.V. coated box with embossed sides and a felt lined insert with the company name in 24k gold foil stamped on it for it to rest in with all the little parts individualy wrapped allong with a manual in 30 langua! I didnt want any of that jink jist a well made workong product!
内容评价-翻译: 如果可以打负10分，我会这么做！我的这个完全是垃圾，可能是我买过的质量最差的产品之一！这个应用程序对我来说从来没好用过！在轻度使用大约一周后，它运行得还不错，然后振动器在使用第3次或第4次时就坏了。之后，不知什么原因，如果真空度超过4，它就会停止推进和旋转，除了像卡住了一样什么都做不了。取下真空装置后它又开始工作，但这种情况只是有时发生，其他时候你得拍打顶部才能让旋转和推进功能启动！这是我去年买的一款类似机器的劣质仿制品，当时看到有带应用程序的AI版本可以购买，我非常高兴！没想到这个产品会这么糟糕！我不明白为什么卖家要在复杂的包装上浪费钱！他们似乎觉得必须用能找到的最昂贵的设计师包装来运送产品，而我想要的是一个质量好、能正常工作的产品，不是一个装在有光泽和哑光UV涂层、侧面有浮雕、里面有毛毡衬里的盒子里的垃圾，盒子上还用24K金箔印着公司名称，所有小零件都单独包装，还有一本30种语言的说明书！我不想要那些垃圾，只想要一个做工精良、能正常工作的产品！

标题: A Complete Waste of Time and Money
内容:
Honestly, I expected a lot more from this when I read the reviews. But it definitely did not live up to either the advertising or the feedback.

The first issue is the noise. When suction reaches full, you can definitely hear it... and the vibration is a bit louder than expected as well. (Including a rattling noise.) Fortunately I took it for a test run when nobody else was home.

You'd also better be prepared to use a LOT of lube around the opening, because not only is it tight, but the suction pulls the lube in. This means you end up getting some serious traction at the base. The problem with using that much lube is that it also ends up getting that much messier. So there's a lot to clean up when you take it apart, not to mention cleaning yourself up.

The variety of settings is ok, but barely. Mostly because there seems to not be a lot of variation. a slight change in tempo or intensity for the vibration and suction, and that's about it. I got to a point where I was having to use it manually like a basic onahole. (In fact, I get more sensation and pleasure out of the non-mechanical item I have than I did with this one.)

The texture... meh. Had to use so much lube both to get my... well... Mr. Not-All-That-Happy-With-This... inside that the texture became irrelevant.

One other issue worth mentioning: When I was using it, I kept having to pull the external part of the sleeve back out of the housing because it kept folding itself back up into the casing on one side.

In the end, and even using one of my favorite videos for visual and auditory stimulation, I ended up having to resort to using my hand to finish the job.

It's just too bad that I wasted this much money on a product I can't return or get a refund for because of health and safety reasons with it being a "personal use" item.
内容评价-翻译:
老实说，看了评论后，我对这个产品期望很高。但它肯定没有达到广告宣传和用户反馈的水平。

第一个问题是噪音。当吸力达到最大时，你肯定能听到……而且震动也比预期的要大一些（还包括一种咔嗒咔嗒的声音）。幸运的是，我是在没人在家的时候试用的。

你最好准备好在开口处使用大量润滑剂，因为它不仅很紧，而且吸力会把润滑剂吸进去。这意味着在根部会产生很大的摩擦力。使用这么多润滑剂的问题是，也会因此变得非常脏乱。所以拆开清洗的时候有很多东西要清理，更不用说还要清洁自己了。

设置的多样性还可以，但也就那样。主要是因为似乎没有太多变化。震动和吸力的速度或强度有轻微变化，仅此而已。我到了不得不像使用基本的飞机杯一样手动操作它的地步。（事实上，我从我的非机械用品中获得的感觉和快感比这个还多。）

质地……嗯。我不得不用那么多润滑剂才能把我的……好吧……对这个不太满意的先生……放进去，以至于质地变得无关紧要了。

还有一个值得一提的问题：我使用的时候，不得不不停地把套筒的外部部分从外壳里拉出来，因为它总是在一侧自己折回外壳里。

最后，即使我用了我最喜欢的视频来进行视觉和听觉刺激，最终还是不得不靠手来完成。

太糟糕了，我花了这么多钱买了一个因为“个人使用”物品的健康和安全原因而不能退货或退款的产品。

标题: Not worth it. The worst. Huuuuge disappointment.
内容:
As far as **Nut-busting** equipment goes, this is like trying to bust nuts with a floppy garbage bag. Absolutely no grip. The, erm, "flashlight" cover is so loose the contents of it often pull out, or worse, sink in! No matter how much lubricant is used. It's loud too. Very gassy and the outer "suction" dial is so laughably poor a design.

I say "suction" in quotes because there is no suction, not really. It's too floppy in the case, and has multiple air escapes which cause the suction to feel....meh. Very meh.

The whole damn thing is just meh. Look I'm not some major stud here but this thing makes you feel huge...and somehow tiny at the same time lol. It's so confusing. God help you if you don't use enough lube and god help you if you use more than the exact correct amount or the thing will start leaking. And mine came sealed and new too, so it wasn't broken. That's not a design flaw, it's a feature!!!

There is absolutely no 'realism' in this thing. It's barely worth 20 bucks let alone upwards of 60. If this is their premium toy then I think the brand is overhyped and you should save your money.
内容评价-翻译:
就所谓的“碎坚果”设备而言，这就像是试图用一个软塌塌的垃圾袋来砸坚果。完全抓不住。那个，呃，“手电筒”外壳太松了，里面的东西经常掉出来，或者更糟，陷进去！不管用多少润滑剂都没用。它还很吵。非常“放气”，而且外面的“吸力”旋钮设计得糟糕透顶，简直可笑。

我用引号括起“吸力”是因为根本没有吸力，真的没有。它在壳子里太松软了，还有多个漏气点，导致吸力感觉……一般。非常一般。

这该死的东西整体就是一般般。听着，我不是什么猛男，但这玩意儿会让你感觉自己很大……同时又莫名其妙地很小，哈哈。太让人困惑了。如果你没用足够的润滑剂，那祝你好运；如果你用的量超过了确切的合适剂量，那也祝你好运，因为这东西会开始漏。而且我的还是密封全新的，所以它没坏。那不是设计缺陷，那是“特色”！！！

这东西完全没有“真实感”。它连20美元都不值，更别说60多美元了。如果这就是他们的高端玩具，那我觉得这个品牌被过度炒作了，你应该省着点钱。

内容: My first experience with Fleshlight was the Pink Ladt with the Wonder Wave design. The review was spot on with this and I enjoyed it very much. I guess I should take these reviews more seriously when I see negative feedback. I was so excited about Stoya that I focused more on the positive than negative. I feel like what is sold through Amazon are the factory seconds. When I received it the sleeve was in a black plastic bag like some kind of knockoff from China. After taking it out the first thing I noticed was the untrimmed pieces of material at the end and the thickness of the sleeve. I took these photos to also show what the inside looks like which seems to be different than the cutaway shown on the Fleshlight site. Still being excited to try it I put on a video of Stoya, lubed up and went for a drive. I felt disappointed immediately. I’m average in length and have better than average girth. Not only was the sensation disappointing, but inside I felt a couple of the nodules actually scraping me to the point of discomfort. I had to turn the sleeve to the point of where the nodules weren’t affecting me. Overall this is not a great sleeve. Maybe slightly better than your hand, but not worth the price.
内容评价-翻译: 我第一次使用Fleshlight是带有Wonder Wave设计的Pink Lady款。相关评测非常准确，我非常喜欢它。我想当看到负面反馈时，我应该更认真地对待这些评测。我对Stoya款太兴奋了，以至于更多地关注了正面评价而忽略了负面评价。我感觉亚马逊上销售的是工厂的二等品。当我收到它时，套筒装在一个黑色塑料袋里，就像某种来自中国的仿制品。把它拿出来后，我注意到的第一件事是末端未修剪的材料碎片和套筒的厚度。我拍了这些照片也是为了展示内部的样子，这似乎与Fleshlight网站上展示的剖面图不同。尽管如此，我还是很兴奋地想尝试一下，我播放了Stoya的视频，涂了润滑剂，然后开始使用。我立刻感到失望。我的长度中等， girth比平均水平好。不仅感觉令人失望，而且我感觉到里面有几个凸起实际上在刮擦我，到了不舒服的程度。我不得不转动套筒，直到凸起不再影响我为止。总的来说，这不是一个很好的套筒。可能比你的手稍微好一点，但不值这个价格。

内容:
Complete rewrite:
This was recommended to me by a girl who liked the joint smartphone app possibilities, with her Lovense vulse.
Problems:

- Doesn't last very long on a charge.
- Can't be returned if you don't like it, for obvious reasons.
- Absolutely needs lubricant, preferably deep inside. This is not mentioned in the instructions, so I don't know whether the usual rubber-safe liquid is necessary
- It's huge - 9 cm, dia. - and, for me,  not very comfortable to hold.
- And last, but not least - in fact almost a product killer - the entry aperture is far too small. I have an average sized member but had to be FULLY erect and use lubricant and force to get inside. By the time I succeeded, I'd lost interest. But this is fixable.

The fix - make the aperture much wider, but how? A small knife won't work, because the polymer insert is too flexible, and bends out of the way. However,  hot knife melts/cuts it easily. After i did this, i found that the motions were fun. I haven't tried the joint apps yet, but looking forward to it.

I've still given it a low rating, because a fairly expensive product from a well-known manufacturer shouldn't have all these flaws.

Lovense's app is topnotch, and you can easily control this from a phone or through a web interface. For playing with a partner, it's great. You can connect it directly to a Mac with Bluetooth, but for a PC you need a special dongle, which is *ridiculous.*

There's no mounting bracket, so you'll have to hold it in your hand or jam it up against something. The outer surface is very slippery, especially if you have lube on your fingers. The ridged design helps, though.

I bought it direct from Lovense for half off on sale, and I don't feel cheated, but if I'd known all of the above I probably would have bought something else. I would be pretty upset if I'd paid $200 for it.
内容评价-翻译:
其他评论者都称赞它的吸力：但我觉得它的吸力不足。这是因为质量控制不一致，还是我只是不太敏感，我说不好。我希望这个振动器有一个“更嗡嗡作响”的设置。说明书遗漏了最重要的部分之一：通风口到底有什么作用？我的意思是，显然，它可以排出空气，但这有什么效果呢？答案是：它会降低吸力。不用谢。

Lovense的应用程序是一流的，你可以轻松地通过手机或网络界面控制它。对于和伴侣一起使用来说，这很棒。你可以通过蓝牙直接将它连接到Mac电脑，但对于PC电脑，你需要一个特殊的加密狗，这太荒谬了。

它没有安装支架，所以你必须用手拿着它，或者把它塞在什么东西上。外表面非常滑，尤其是当你的手指上有润滑剂的时候。不过，带纹路的设计有所帮助。

我是在Lovense官网打折时半价买的，我不觉得被骗了，但如果我早知道以上所有情况，我可能会买别的东西。如果我花200美元买它，我会非常不高兴。

标题: Decent, but there's better value elsewhere
内容:
Putting this review here 2 years after the fact, so keep that in mind as you read.
This isn't really the best in any department as far as sex toys go, especially strokers.
However, it is a pretty compelling jack-of-all-trades. It's portable enough, and does as advertised pretty well.
My principle complaint is mostly just that it's competition outclasses it in all regards, usually in most aspects.

For instance; if you're intending to buy this and it's mount to mount to a desk or something, the OSR2 and SR6 are significantly better in all regards, while only being a tad bit pricier, much less than you'd think. Even cheaper if you're willing to source all the materials yourself.

If you need something portable, obviously the Handy 2 does better, but several other third party companies have comparable or better equivalents.

This, as far as I'm aware, is the only one that's decent at both. And I could easily be wrong.
Overall, I'd recommend against buying this. It's one of those things where you're gonna end up spending more money to make it a little closer to something else, where if you instead focused your money all on that one thing you're thinking of, you'd actually come out having spent less.
TL;DR: Just get an SR6 or OSR2 if you need something emplaced. Otherwise, this is a fine pick if you're willing to put up with it's quirks.
内容评价-翻译:
这篇评论是在事情发生两年后写的，所以阅读时请记住这一点。

就性玩具而言，尤其是手动自慰器，它在任何方面都算不上最好的。

然而，它是一个相当不错的多面手。它足够便携，而且正如广告宣传的那样，效果相当好。

我主要的抱怨是，它的竞争对手在所有方面通常都比它更优秀。

例如；如果你打算购买这个产品并将其固定在桌子之类的东西上，OSR2 和 SR6 在各方面都明显更好，而价格只贵一点点，比你想象的要便宜得多。如果你愿意自己采购所有材料，甚至更便宜。

如果你需要便携的东西，显然 Handy 2 更好，但其他几家第三方公司也有相当或更好的同类产品。

据我所知，这是唯一一个在这两方面都还算不错的产品。当然我也可能说错了。

总的来说，我不建议购买这个产品。这是那种你最终会花更多的钱来让它更接近其他东西的产品，而如果你把钱都集中在你想要的那一个东西上，实际上你花的钱会更少。

TL;DR：如果你需要固定安装的东西，就买 SR6 或 OSR2。否则，如果你愿意忍受它的一些小毛病，这是一个不错的选择。

It's also nearly impossible to realign the eggshell casing together in order to re-enclose the toy when done. The only positive was that it comes with a small sample of decent lube. 内容评价-翻译: 我试了两种不同的设计，对两者都不满意。首先，这些东西太小了，即使对最普通体型的男性来说也是如此。内部的纹理图案一点也不柔软舒服，实际上还造成了一些刺激。只用了一次它们就都变形了，蛋的顶部看起来非常凹凸不平且很薄。用完后几乎不可能把蛋壳外壳重新对齐合在一起把玩具装回去。唯一的优点是它附带了一小份不错的润滑剂样品。在第一次也是唯一一次使用后，我不会再用这些了。归根结底，这更像是一个新奇礼物，而不是一个正经的成人玩具。

标题: Cheap, portable toy, but nothing too impressive
内容:
Product packaging and overall quality seems good.

Product Egg itself is rather small.  I got the Wavy II and it's actually not much larger than my head (you know which one).  I am of average size, and I was shocked at how small it was.  That said, it doesn't feel tight, but stretchy.

The "rubber" does seem very fragile, but the material does stretch quite well.  It will stretch fairly thin, and while it does feel nice, it doesn't give me enough friction to take me where I want to go.

Also, it's definitely more than a one-time use item.  Just take care of it, clean it, dry it, and keep it inside the egg's shell and it should last you a while, or until it breaks.  Not sure how often I'll use it, but I think it would be better to spend money on something more versatile.  This is just an average product that I don't see myself buying again.  Again, not a bad product, just not my thing.

Inclosing, I just want to say that tried this one out on the advice of a friend, but I wouldn't really recommend them unless you can't afford anything better.
内容评价-翻译:
产品包装和整体质量看起来不错。

产品本身相当小。我买的是Wavy II，它实际上并不比我的头大多少（你知道是哪个头）。我身材中等，对它的小尺寸感到震惊。话虽如此，它并不觉得紧绷，而是有弹性。

这种“橡胶”看起来确实很脆弱，但材料的延展性相当好。它可以拉伸得相当薄，虽然摸起来感觉不错，但摩擦力不足以让我达到想要的效果。

此外，它绝对不只是一次性用品。只要好好保养、清洁、晾干，并把它放在蛋形外壳里，应该能用上一段时间，直到它破损。不确定我会用多久，但我觉得花钱买更通用的东西会更好。这只是一个普通产品，我不认为自己会再买。再说一次，不是产品不好，只是不适合我。

最后，我只想说，我是在朋友的建议下尝试了这个，但除非你买不起更好的，否则我真的不推荐。

标题: Extremely Small and Unusable for Average or Above-Average Girth — Disappointing Experience
内容:
I really wish the product description had included accurate sizing information. If you're around 5.5” girth or more, this is not going to fit you at all. I’m about 6.5” mid-shaft girth, and even with a generous amount of lube, I couldn’t get it past my glans — it was painfully tight. It felt like it was made for someone with the girth of a thumb or maybe even smaller. There's virtually no stretch to the material, which defeats the purpose of what should be a flexible, accommodating product.

To make matters worse, the material was already peeling and damaged straight out of the box — and I discovered this just by turning it inside out to clean it. It looked used or extremely low quality. I requested a refund immediately.

Additionally, my item arrived in a previously used shipping bag with someone else's name and address info still on it. The box was already ripped open, and the toy was just sitting loose inside. That’s absolutely unacceptable for a personal-use item like this.

My partner also tried it (he's smaller than I am), and even he said it was uncomfortable and too tight to enjoy. It honestly feels like this toy was designed by someone who’s never handled an average-sized adult male — let alone one with any extra girth.

Bottom line: If your penis is larger than a pencil in thickness, do not buy this. It’s too small, tight, non-stretchy, and potentially reused. Complete waste of money and potentially unsafe due to the visible wear and poor packaging. This product should come with proper sizing warnings, and Amazon should be more careful about repackaging returns in this category.
内容评价-翻译:
我真希望产品描述中包含准确的尺寸信息。如果你的周长在5.5英寸左右或更大，这个完全不适合你。我的中轴周长约为6.5英寸，即使使用了大量润滑剂，也无法将其套过龟头——紧得让人疼痛。感觉它是为拇指粗细甚至更细的人设计的。这种材料几乎没有弹性，这违背了本应是灵活、适应性强的产品的初衷。

更糟糕的是，产品刚开箱，材料就已经起皮损坏了——我只是把它翻过来清洁时就发现了这一点。它看起来像是用过的，或者质量极差。我立即申请了退款。

此外，我收到的商品是装在一个用过的 shipping bag 里，上面还留有别人的姓名和地址信息。盒子已经被撕开，玩具就松松垮垮地放在里面。对于这种个人使用的物品来说，这是绝对不可接受的。

我的伴侣也试了一下（他比我小），连他都说不舒服，太紧了，无法享受。老实说，感觉这个玩具的设计者从未接触过普通尺寸的成年男性——更不用说那些周长较大的了。

底线是：如果你的阴茎粗细超过铅笔，就不要买这个。它太小、太紧、没有弹性，还可能是二手的。完全是浪费钱，而且由于明显的磨损和糟糕的包装，可能还不安全。这个产品应该有适当的尺寸警告，亚马逊也应该更小心这类商品的退货重新包装问题。

标题: A thrill that's a little too short-lived
内容:
This toy really rubs the right way—Literally! From the nubs to the ribs, the texture is spot on, providing just the right amount of sensation. The grip is solid, and it holds lubricant well without turning into a slippery mess.

But let's talk about staying power. After just six uses, the nubbed end started to come apart— less "built for pleasure" and more "built for planned obsolescence." It gets the job done, but only for a handful of times... Which, ironically, is fitting.

If you're looking for a short-term fling rather than a long-term commitment, this might be your match. Otherwise, you may want something with a little more stamina.

Easy to use, you value for money is good as a disposable, could be longer size
内容评价-翻译:
这个玩具确实很对路——名副其实！从凸起的小点到条状纹理，触感恰到好处，能提供适量的刺激。握感扎实，能很好地锁住润滑剂，不会变得湿滑难握。

但我们来谈谈耐用性。只用了六次，带凸起的那头就开始脱落——与其说是“为愉悦而生”，不如说是“为计划性淘汰而造”。它能完成任务，但也就几次而已……颇具讽刺意味的是，这倒也“名副其实”。

标题: Doesn't live up to the marketing hype for me
内容:
Pardon the bad pun, but different strokes for different folks I guess.  I had really high hopes for this toy, the so-low lotion, and the stim for him gel, which I purchased together as a package. As marketed, it seemed to combine everything I was looking for. A simple, discreet stroker, a unique lubricant that differs from the same old runny, water-based, last a few minutes then turn sticky lubricant, and a stimulating gel for extra sensation. Before purchasing I double checked the info on Amazon and confirmed the lotion was indeed meant to be compatible with the toy.  There was a question posted about it with an answer from the company confirming it is. So I gave it a shot.

So far, I've tried it on two seperate occasions without success. I used plenty of the lotion first without and later with the stim gel.  In the stroker, it seems to feel pretty good for a few minutes and then dissapate, with very little glide left whatsoever. At that point, it becomes uncomfortable (not painful, but not enjoyable), enough that it kind of killed the session. I reapplied several times trying to get it going again, but it really just didn't feel great after that and the sensations of the stroker weren't doing much for me.  I tried again a couple days later and had almost the exact same experience.

I'll say that I did try the lotion and gel skin on skin, and it was nice. Definitely better than with the stroker, which almost seemed to absorb it (I don't think it actually did, just make it dry up quickly). It's just not my preferred method and not why I made this purchase. I also tried the stroker with a water-based lube and it definitely felt better, but with the open end it was messy and the outside of the stroker became slippery and hard to grip the stroker leaving me frustrated.

I have tried several different toys for men over time, ranging from single use Tenga eggs to cheap reusable novelty type items to mid-high range toys like the Fleshlight. This is my first experience where I'm actually not sure if I'm going to get any enjoyment out of a product and I'm kind of bummed to be honest.  There obviously isn't a shortage of variety when it comes to toys and lubricants, but having tried a few different types, this combo really piqued my interest. I wish I hadn't went all in on all 3 items, because it now feels like a waste.

I'd probably give the stroker 2.5 stars if I could. It seems durable and if you find the right lubricant with it and are prepared for a little mess, it could be good for some people - especially those who have never tried something like this. For me, it really didn't meet my expectations. Especially with the other two items as marketed and sold together as a package.
内容评价-翻译:
请原谅这个蹩脚的双关语，但我想应该是萝卜青菜各有所爱吧。我对这个玩具、索洛 lotion 和男士刺激凝胶寄予了很高的期望，我是把它们作为一个套装一起购买的。正如宣传的那样，它似乎结合了我想要的一切：一个简单、隐蔽的飞机杯，一种独特的润滑剂（不同于那些老套的、水基的、只能持续几分钟然后就变黏的润滑剂），以及一种能带来额外刺激感的凝胶。购买前，我仔细查看了亚马逊上的信息，确认这款 lotion 确实与该玩具兼容。有一个相关问题，公司回复确认了这一点。所以我决定尝试一下。

到目前为止，我已经尝试了两次，但都没有成功。我先用了大量的 lotion，后来又加了刺激凝胶。在飞机杯里，刚开始几分钟感觉还不错，然后润滑效果就消失了，几乎没有任何顺滑感。这时，感觉就变得不舒服了（不是疼痛，但也不愉悦），足以让整个过程戛然而止。我重新涂抹了好几次，想让它恢复效果，但之后感觉真的不太好，飞机杯带来的刺激感对我来说也没什么作用。几天后我又试了一次，体验几乎完全相同。

我要说的是，我确实尝试过将 lotion 和凝胶直接用于肌肤相亲，感觉还不错。绝对比用在飞机杯上好，飞机杯似乎会吸收它们（我觉得实际上并没有吸收，只是让它们很快变干了）。但这不是我喜欢的方式，也不是我购买这个套装的原因。我还尝试过用普通的水基润滑剂搭配这个飞机杯，感觉确实好多了，但由于飞机杯是开放式的，所以很容易弄脏，而且飞机杯的外部会变得很滑，很难握住，这让我很沮丧。

这些年来，我尝试过几种不同的男士玩具，从一次性的 Tenga 蛋，到便宜的可重复使用的新奇玩具，再到中高端的玩具，比如 Fleshlight。这是我第一次不确定自己是否能从一个产品中获得任何乐趣，说实话，我有点沮丧。显然，玩具和润滑剂的种类并不缺乏，但尝试过几种不同类型后，这个组合确实引起了我的兴趣。我真希望当初没有一下子买齐这三样东西，因为现在感觉像是浪费了。

如果可以的话，我可能会给这个飞机杯打 2.5 星。它看起来很耐用，如果你能找到合适的润滑剂，并且准备好接受一点脏乱，它可能对某些人来说还不错——尤其是那些从未尝试过这类产品的人。对我来说，它真的没有达到我的期望，尤其是考虑到另外两个产品是作为套装一起宣传和销售的。

内容:
I feel pretty ripped off by this, I'll be honest. Insertion was very uncomfortable, required gobs of lube. Pretty much only worked around the tip because deeper would constrict me. My circumference is only 6 inches, which is larger yes, but its not out of the average range. It seems like if you want to actually feel any of the texture you need a diameter of like 1 inch.

Material felt good though, running my fingers through it I can imagine under different circumstances it would probably feel really good.
内容评价-翻译: 老实说，我对此感觉非常受骗。插入时非常不舒服，需要大量润滑剂。基本上只能在顶端附近起作用，因为插得更深会让我感到紧绷。我的周长只有6英寸，确实是比较大，但并没有超出平均范围。似乎如果你真的想感受到任何纹理，直径需要大约1英寸。不过材料感觉不错，用手指抚摸时，我能想象在不同的情况下它可能会感觉非常好。

标题: Feels nice, good price, bad design and messy
内容:
It’s a little small but stretched out nicely. Honestly the material feels pretty good, but this thing can get so messy so quickly. There’s no hole to let air out, so you end up in a situation where lube is being pushed out at the base. Once it gets on your hands it’s game over and you can’t hold onto these.

Good for the price, interesting and pretty satisfying feel, have some paper towels ready.
内容评价-翻译:
它有点小，但延展性很好。说实话，材质感觉相当不错，但这东西很快就会变得一团糟。没有排气孔，所以最终会出现润滑剂从底部被挤出来的情况。一旦沾到手上就完了，你根本抓不住这些。

物有所值，感觉有趣且相当令人满意，记得准备好纸巾。

标题: If you're reading this it's too small for you
内容:
I would describe this product overall as small. It requires a large amount of lubricant that WILL spill out and make it hard to grip. It does stretch pretty far however it simply too small for it to help. The only fix I could think of, is to double the size of it but keep the price same right now is roughly $30 after taxes and fees. It's worth $10.
Double the size. Keep the price the
same. Profit.

标题: Try to get it on a discount
内容: Overall, I've purchased about 6 of these. Not really because I love them so much that I just had to get the whole collection, rather, they don't really last all that long. The spinning function comes from the hard plastic spirals embedded within the elastomer. Over time it will break through the elastomer and cause air leak, which will ruin any suction and leak lubricant during use, rendering the item pretty much useless. The dimension are perfectly serviceable, sometimes I wish it were a BIT longer but it works okay. The tightness of the opening is really top notch for the first 3 or so uses, but it very quickly loosens up and never quite matches the initial suction. Overall, for $20 it's pretty good, you'll probably get about 2 months of pretty regular use out of each unit. I prefer the Shell variant, as I like the suction.
内容评价-翻译: 总的来说，我买了大约6个这种产品。并不是因为我特别喜欢它们，非要集齐所有款式，而是它们确实不怎么耐用。旋转功能来自嵌入弹性体中的硬塑料螺旋。随着时间的推移，它会穿透弹性体，导致漏气，这会破坏吸力，并在使用过程中漏润滑剂，使产品几乎完全无法使用。尺寸还算实用，有时候我希望它能再长一点点，但用起来还可以。开口的紧度在最初的大约3次使用时确实非常好，但很快就会变松，再也达不到最初的吸力。总的来说，20美元的价格还算不错，每个产品你大概能正常使用大约2个月。我更喜欢贝壳款，因为我喜欢它的吸力。

内容:
Das Teil tut schlichtweg nicht was es soll.. an Oberflächen halten. Ich hab es mit Tischplatten, Holz, Glas und Fliesen probiert. Oberfläche und Saugfuß sind sauber und trocken. Wenn man es platziert und festzieht sitzt es erstmal ordentlich und man hat das Gefühl es hält. So ungefähr 5-10 Sekunden. Sobald aber eine seitliche Bewegung auf das Teil einwirkt verrutscht es sofort.. und dadurch verliert es sofort an Saugleistung. Ich hab auch probiert es mit Wasser zu befeuchten, aber das funktioniert noch schlechter.

Es war mir durch die mangelhafte Funktion nicht möglich es für den vorgeshenen Einsatzzweck auszuprobieren.
内容评价-翻译:
这个东西根本不能完成它应有的功能——吸附在表面上。我试过在桌面、木头、玻璃和瓷砖上使用。表面和吸盘都是干净且干燥的。当你把它放好并固定时，一开始确实很稳固，感觉能吸住。大约5-10秒吧。但只要对这个东西施加侧向力，它就会立刻滑动……从而立即失去吸附力。我也试过用水浸湿它，但效果更差。

由于功能缺陷，我无法将其用于预期的用途。

标题: Works quite well but needs more attachments.
内容:
So this will work with some of the Fleshlights but not all of them, some are too loose for either attachment and that's a shame, really relying on purely the threads to support the whole thing was a bit optimistic, they should have had also some kind of holder to support the first half of the fleshlight also to offer stability.

Because if you move around too much it's going to jossle those threads and wiggle it out of the mount and then your fleshlight will come crashing down to the floor and make a really nice noise.  Tested it with several fleshlights of differing ages and types and found only one fitted properly in the threads.  If you have one that fits this, then great, if not your going to be disappointed.  The sucker cup works well and sticks firmly at least, the threads wont hold up though.
内容评价-翻译:
这适用于部分Fleshlight产品，但并非全部，有些产品对于两个附件来说都太松了，这很遗憾。仅仅依靠螺纹来支撑整个装置确实有点过于乐观，他们本应该设计某种支架来支撑Fleshlight的前半部分，以提供稳定性。

因为如果你移动幅度过大，会晃动那些螺纹，导致它从支架上松脱，然后你的Fleshlight就会掉落到地板上，发出很大的声响。我用不同使用年限和型号的几款Fleshlight进行了测试，发现只有一款能正确旋入螺纹。如果你有合适的型号，那很好，否则你会失望的。不过吸盘确实很有效，至少能牢固地吸附，但螺纹支撑不住。

内容:
Vorneweg für alle, bei denen die Halterung nicht hällt ein Tipp:

Als ich das Ding das erste Mal trocken in der Dusche befestigt hatte, fiel es nach ca. 10 Minuten von alleine zu Boden, ohne das sogar das FL_Insert drin war oder ich irgendwas berüht habe.
Nach einigem Testen fiel mir auf, wenn man die Unterseite des Saugnapfes richtig feucht macht, sodass sich Flüssigkeit darin befindet, dann hält es bombenfest und fällt auch während der Benutzung nicht ab, never! Dies macht ja Sinn, es ist ja ein "Shower-Mount" für die Dusche und dort ist es nass. Der Hersteller sollte unbedingt ein Hinweis anbringen, dass es trocken nicht funktioniert!

Nachdem dieses Problem gelöst war, fiel mir aber der eigentlich wichtigere Nachteil auf. Wenn man die FL am Shower-Mount befestigt entsteht eine Öffnung hinten und der Unterdruck ist nicht mehr mit dem verschraubten Rückdeckel regulierbar. Gerade für weniger stimulierende Inserts bei denen der Saugeffekt wichtig ist, macht deswegen die Benutzung keinen Spass mehr.
内容评价-翻译:
首先给所有支架不牢固的人一个提示：

当我第一次在淋浴间里干装这个东西时，大约10分钟后它就自己掉地上了，当时甚至FL_Insert都没装进去，我也没碰它。
经过一番测试，我发现如果把吸盘的底部弄湿，让里面有液体，它就会非常牢固，使用时也绝不会掉下来，绝不！这是有道理的，毕竟这是用于淋浴间的“淋浴支架”，那里是潮湿的。制造商绝对应该加个提示，说明干用不行！

解决了这个问题后，我却发现了一个更重要的缺点。当把FL固定在淋浴支架上时，后面会出现一个开口，负压就不能再用拧上的后盖来调节了。对于那些刺激性较小、吸附效果很重要的插件来说，使用体验因此变得不再有趣。

内容:
It's cheaper to buy this mount on Amazon than on the official website, but you get what you pay for - mine shipped with FLESHLIGHT right on the label. The jokes made by my apartment manager when I picked up the package had the same level of subtlety as this label. Not fun.

In terms of the product itself, I believe it really enhances the experience. Nice to keep your hands free while doing the deed in a place that, well, exists to clean you up. My last one lasted about 3 months of pretty consistent use, which to me is decent but not ideal. Suction was perfect for the first 2 months then got progressively worse. Hoping this replacement has a longer lifespan.
内容评价-翻译:
在亚马逊上买这个支架比在官网便宜，但一分钱一分货——我的包裹标签上赫然印着“FLESHLIGHT”。我去取包裹时，公寓经理开的玩笑和这个标签一样直白。一点也不好笑。

就产品本身而言，我觉得它确实提升了体验。在一个本就是用来清洁你的地方办事时，能解放双手挺好的。我上一个用了大约3个月，使用频率还挺高，对我来说算不错但不够理想。前两个月的吸力很完美，之后就逐渐变差了。希望这个替换的能用得久一点。

内容: Habe extra mehrfach ausprobiert, damit Fehler meinerseits ausgeschlossen werden können. Aber das Fazit ist folgendes:Viel zu eng und die Programme viel zu hektisch. Es ist als würde man versuchen, einen Presslufthammer zu besteigen . Man braucht drei Pfund Getriebeöl, damit einem die Gurke nicht verbogen wird. und wer das Geräusch als dezent empfindet, der hält Korn für eine Schmuseband. Ja, man könnte es richtig interpretieren als Enttäuschung. Dann lieber eine Verabredung mit meinen beiden Freunden, linke und rechte Hand.
内容评价-翻译: 我特意反复尝试了多次，以排除我这边可能出现的错误。但结论如下：空间太窄，程序也太匆忙。感觉就像是试图爬上一个风镐。你需要三磅齿轮油，这样黄瓜才不会被弄弯。如果有人觉得这声音很柔和，那他肯定把 Korn（可能指某种嘈杂的东西，或人名/品牌）当成了轻音乐频道。是的，这完全可以理解为失望。那我宁愿和我的两个朋友——左手和右手——约个会。

内容: Die Verarbeitung und das Konzept ist gut. Der Verschlussdeckel hält überhaupt nicht. Der Motor ist nicht Wasserdicht. Es gibt keine Saugfunktion. Wenn man, wie in meinem Alter Ende 40, keine dauerhafte Erektion mehr aufrecht halten kann, funktioniert es nicht ohne Saugfunktion. Nach 5 Min. fluppt er raus und es wird nervig. Ich habe noch ein Gerät mit Saugfunktion, aber leider ohne Halter  mit Saugfuß. Ein Saugfuß am Gerät ist super praktisch und man kann es dadurch wirklich Hand frei  nennen. Bei Geräten mit Saugfunktion, wird der Pimmel rein gezogen und bleibt durch das Vakuum immer steif und es macht Spaß . Ohne macht es nur Sinn, wenn man eine permanente, fest Erektion hat. Mit 20 ging das total super. Aber jetzt über und nach einem Schlaganfall auf der rechten Seiten funktioniert es selbst mit Viagra nicht mehr gut genug und macht nicht wirklich Spaß. Deshalb habe ich offenbar das falsche Teil gekauft. Zuerst eines ohne Halterung und dann eines ohne Vakuum Pumpe. Jetzt bin ich schlauer Ich will nach dem Schlaganfall, nicht auf alles verzichten und dachte, mit dem Teil könnte ich wieder mehr Spaß haben. Wie auch immer für gesunde und jüngere Leute ist das Teil eine klare Empfehlung Wert! Für Menschen mit Erektionsproblemen nicht zu gebrauchen. Zu reinigen ist es sehr leicht! Man kann das Silikon Innenleben einfach heraus ziehen und waschen . Die Bauteile haben im Gegensatz zu anderen Herstellern, keinen unangenehmen Geruch nach Weichmacher oder Öl. Nach dem Reinigen riecht das Teil relativ neutral! Der schlecht verarbeitete Verschlussdeckel stört mich sehr. Ein einfaches Gewinde und das Problem wäre beseitigt.
内容评价-翻译: 处理方式和设计理念都不错。盖子根本盖不住。电机不防水。没有吸力功能。像我这种快40岁的人，如果不能持久勃起，没有吸力功能的话这东西就没用。5分钟后它就滑出来了，很让人恼火。我还有一个带吸力功能的设备，但可惜没有带吸盘的支架。设备上的吸盘非常实用，有了它才能真正称得上是解放双手。对于有吸力功能的设备，它会把阴茎吸进去，通过真空作用保持坚挺，玩起来很有乐趣。如果没有吸力功能，只有当你能持久、坚挺勃起时才有意义。20岁的时候完全没问题。但现在，加上右侧中风后，即使吃了伟哥也效果不佳，真的没什么乐趣。所以我显然买错了东西。先是买了一个没有支架的，然后又买了一个没有真空泵的。现在我学聪明了。中风后我不想放弃一切，原以为用这个东西能重新获得更多乐趣。不管怎样，对于健康的年轻人来说，这东西绝对值得推荐！对于有勃起问题的人来说没用。清洗起来很容易！可以把里面的硅胶部分取出来清洗。与其他厂家不同，这些部件没有难闻的增塑剂或油味。清洗后味道比较中性！做工粗糙的盖子让我很困扰。一个简单的螺纹就能解决这个问题。

标题: Gute Funktionen - Hat nur 2 Monate gehalten
内容:
Wie vielen anderen Rezensionen hier, kann ich mich der Funktionsweise dieses Masturbators nur anschließen. Es hat viele interessante Funktionen, die dich garantiert zum Höhepunkt bringen.

Das war aber auch schon alles.

Es sieht nicht sehr erotisch aus, weshalb man denken könnte, man wird wie eine Milchkuh gemolken. Mit geschlossenen Augen kann man es also genießen.

Außerdem hat sich das Teil nach nur zwei Monaten und gelegentlicher Nutzung heute verabschiedet. Trotz 4 stündiger Ladung funktionierte es nicht mehr.
Sehr enttäuschend, musste dann eben selbst Hand anlegen.

Ein Fall für die Tonne! Definitiv keine Kaufempfehlung.
内容评价-翻译:
和这里的许多其他评论一样，我只能认同这款自慰器的工作原理。它有许多有趣的功能，保证能让你达到高潮。

但也就仅此而已了。

它看起来不是很性感，所以你可能会觉得自己像一头被挤奶的奶牛。所以你只能闭着眼睛享受它。

此外，这个东西在仅仅两个月的偶尔使用后，今天就坏了。尽管充了4个小时的电，它还是不能用了。
非常令人失望，只好自己动手解决了。

这就是个该扔进垃圾桶的东西！绝对不推荐购买。

Auch sind die Ausmaße von dem Gerät viel zu groß, sehr unhandlich. Die Reinigung ist super einfach. Aber beim Saugnapf, der auch nur am Spiegel, nicht an Fliesen hält, ist gleich die Halterung abgebrochen, Plastik, da muss eine bessere Feststellmöglichkeit geschaffen werden. Ich musste mir einen neuen Saugnapf anderweitig bestellen, der eine bessere Feststellmöglichkeit beinhaltet.

内容:
- ❌ **Suction & Vibration Modes:** 9 modes of disappointment. The suction is weak, the vibration feels like a cheap electric razor, and the “gentle contraction” is more like a sputtering fan.
- ❌ **Heating Feature:** Takes forever to warm up, and when it does, it barely gets warm. Definitely not “incredible warmth and joy” — more like lukewarm regret.
- ❌ **App Control:** A total mess. Constant Bluetooth issues, clunky interface, and pointless “video” and “sound” modes that add nothing but frustration.
- ❌ **LCD & Touch Buttons:** The display is tiny and hard to read. Touch buttons are unresponsive and randomly switch modes mid-use.
- ❌ **Material Quality:** The “3D silicone” sleeve feels sticky and cheap. The texture is more irritating than stimulating.
- ❌ **Fit & Comfort:** Claims to adjust to different sizes, but ends up being too tight or too loose. No middle ground.
- ❌ **Cleaning Process:** Not waterproof, which is ridiculous for a product like this. Cleaning is a hassle and feels like defusing a bomb.
- ❌ **Battery Life:** Two hours to charge for one hour of underwhelming performance. Not worth the wait or the price.

🚫 **Don’t waste your money.**
💩 **Tech gimmicks can’t save bad design.**
🛑 **Avoid this overpriced disappointment.**
👎 **Regret in every mode.**
内容评价-翻译:
- ❌ **吮吸与震动模式**：9种令人失望的模式。吸力微弱，震动感觉就像廉价电动剃须刀，而所谓的“轻柔收缩”更像是一台噼啪作响的风扇。
- ❌ **加热功能**：升温慢得要死，好不容易热了，也只是微微有点温度。绝对不是“令人难以置信的温暖与愉悦”——更像是不冷不热的遗憾。
- ❌ **应用程序控制**：一团糟。蓝牙问题不断，界面笨拙，毫无意义的“视频”和“声音”模式除了让人沮丧别无他用。
- ❌ **LCD显示屏与触摸按键**：显示屏又小又难读。触摸按键反应迟钝，使用过程中还会随机切换模式。
- ❌ **材质质量**：“3D硅胶”套筒摸起来黏糊糊的，质感廉价。纹理非但不刺激，反而很让人不舒服。
- ❌ **贴合与舒适度**：声称能适应不同尺寸，但结果不是太紧就是太松，完全没有中间合适的状态。
- ❌ **清洁过程**：不防水，对于这类产品来说简直荒谬。清洁起来麻烦得要死，感觉像在拆炸弹。
- ❌ **电池续航**：充电两小时，换来一小时不尽如人意的使用体验。不值得等待，也不值这个价。

🚫 **别浪费钱了。**
💩 **科技噱头救不了糟糕的设计。**
🛑 **避开这个价格虚高的失望产品。**
👎 **每种模式都充满遗憾。**
